title: ToolRoleGuard (build-time, fail-fast)
description: Reject at manifest-build time any child whose RESOLVED BoberConfig would place the claude-code provider on a TOOL_ROLE (curator/generator/evaluator/codeReview), throwing BEFORE any child is spawned. Add a new EXPORTED predicate isToolRole(role: RoleName): boolean to src/config/role-providers.ts derived from the authoritative TOOL_ROLES constant (role-providers.ts:25), and export the existing effectiveProvider. New file src/fleet/tool-role-guard.ts exports: type ToolRoleViolation = {childFolder: string; role: RoleName; provider: 'claude-code'}; check(child: FleetChild, resolved: BoberConfig): ToolRoleViolation|null (pure, never throws — for each TOOL_ROLE, if effectiveProvider(role, resolved)==='claude-code' return the violation); assertManifest(manifest: FleetManifest): void which builds each child config via buildChildConfig and THROWS a named Error identifying child.folder+role on the first violation. Wire assertManifest into the fail-fast credential phase in src/fleet/index.ts — call it alongside/just before validateManifestCredentials (BOTH run before coordinator.execute), so no child is spawned when it throws. The never-throw validateManifest is UNCHANGED; the guard is a separate throwing call. The no-flag fleet path stays byte-identical (a clean manifest passes with no throw, no side effects).

successCriteria.description: The project builds with zero TypeScript errors (npm run build) and zero typecheck errors in strict mode (npm run typecheck).
The full test suite passes with zero new failures (npm run test); only the 6 known cockpit-integration MCP failures may fail; existing fleet index/role-providers tests pass unchanged.

Exported isToolRole(role) returns true for 'curator','generator','evaluator','codeReview' and false for 'planner','researcher','chat', and is derived from the authoritative TOOL_ROLES (a test asserts isToolRole agrees with TOOL_ROLES membership — no independently re-declared literal).

ToolRoleGuard.check(child, resolved) returns a ToolRoleViolation {childFolder, role, provider:'claude-code'} when claude-code resolves onto a tool role (e.g. child.config.generator.provider='claude-code'), and returns null for a clean config; check never throws.

ToolRoleGuard.assertManifest(manifest) THROWS a named error whose message contains the offending child.folder and role when any child would place claude-code on a tool role, and does NOT throw for a clean manifest (including one whose children carry tiers from Sprint 2).

assertManifest runs in the fail-fast phase BEFORE coordinator.execute in runFleet (src/fleet/index.ts): a test drives the fleet path (or runFleet with injected deps) with a claude-code-on-generator manifest and asserts it throws and that the coordinator/spawn was never invoked.

The never-throw validateManifest is unchanged and the no-flag fleet path is byte-identical: a clean tier-less manifest passes assertManifest with no throw, and the existing fleet behavior (and ~203-test suite) is unaffected.
lint passes (npm run lint, zero errors); change confined to role-providers.ts (new export), tool-role-guard.ts (new), index.ts (wire the call) + tests; no new SDK/network imports.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify the never-throw validateManifest (the guard is a separate throwing call).
Do NOT re-declare the tool-role list — isToolRole must derive from the authoritative TOOL_ROLES.
Do NOT add blackboard / Phase B work.
Do NOT change tier mapping (Sprint 2) or Grok wiring (Sprint 1).
Do NOT spawn or run children to test the guard — it is a pure pre-spawn check.
stopConditions: claude-code on a tool role throws at build time (before any spawn) naming the child+role, isToolRole derives from TOOL_ROLES, clean manifests pass, validateManifest unchanged, and build/typecheck/test/lint are green with no new failures
definitionOfDone: src/config/role-providers.ts exports isToolRole(role) (from TOOL_ROLES) and effectiveProvider. src/fleet/tool-role-guard.ts exports ToolRoleViolation, check (pure, never-throws), and assertManifest (throws naming child.folder+role). src/fleet/index.ts calls assertManifest in the fail-fast phase before coordinator.execute. Collocated tests cover isToolRole membership, check violation/null, assertManifest throw/clean, the pre-spawn ordering (coordinator not invoked on throw), and the byte-identical clean path. validateManifest unchanged. Build/typecheck/test/lint green.
assumptions: role-providers.ts already has TOOL_ROLES = ['curator','generator','evaluator','codeReview'] (:25) and effectiveProvider(role, config) (:48); isToolRole is a thin `TOOL_ROLES.includes(role)` export and effectiveProvider is exported for the guard.
buildChildConfig(child) (from Sprint 2, tier-aware) yields the resolved BoberConfig the guard inspects via effectiveProvider; the guard calls buildChildConfig per child inside assertManifest.
runFleet (src/fleet/index.ts) has a fail-fast phase (validateManifestCredentials at ~:46) that runs before coordinator.execute; assertManifest is inserted there so a violation prevents any spawn.
Given the tier table never places claude-code (Sprint 2), the guard's real job is catching a hand-authored child.config that does — so tests must construct that case via child.config, not via a tier.
generatorNotes:
Read FIRST: src/config/role-providers.ts (FULL — RoleName :10, TOOL_ROLES :25, effectiveProvider :48 and its claude-code/tool-role fallback logic ~:122-135 which already THROWS if a tool role lands on claude-code with no non-claude-code fallback — note that throw is per-process at config-load; the guard front-loads it at manifest-build time); src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — find validateManifestCredentials ~:46 and the coordinator.execute call; insert assertManifest just before/after the credential loop, both BEFORE execute); src/fleet/child-config.ts (buildChildConfig, tier-aware after Sprint 2); src/fleet/manifest.ts (FleetChild/FleetManifest); arch ADRs in .bober/architecture/arch-20260618-heterogeneous-multi-provider-agent-team-architecture.md (ToolRoleGuard component + CP4 risk: claude-code-on-tool-role build-vs-runtime).

role-providers.ts: add `export function isToolRole(role: RoleName): boolean { return TOOL_ROLES.includes(role); }` and ensure effectiveProvider is exported.

New src/fleet/tool-role-guard.ts: import { isToolRole, effectiveProvider, type RoleName } from '../config/role-providers.js'; import { buildChildConfig } from './child-config.js'; types FleetChild/FleetManifest from './manifest.js'; BoberConfig from '../config/schema.js'. ToolRoleViolation type. `export function check(child, resolved): ToolRoleViolation | null` { for (const role of (['curator','generator','evaluator','codeReview'] as RoleName[])) if (effectiveProvider(role, resolved) === 'claude-code') return {childFolder: child.folder, role, provider:'claude-code'}; return null; } — or iterate all RoleName and gate on isToolRole(role). `export function assertManifest(manifest)` { for (const child of manifest.children) { const resolved = buildChildConfig(child); const v = check(child, resolved); if (v) throw new Error(`Fleet child "${v.childFolder}" places claude-code on tool role "${v.role}" — claude-code cannot drive tools. Use an api-key provider (anthropic/openai-compat) for builder roles.`); } }.

index.ts: in runFleet, BEFORE coordinator.execute (and ideally right next to validateManifestCredentials so both fail-fast checks are colocated), call assertManifest(effectiveManifest). Keep it inside the same pre-spawn region; do not move it after execute.

Tests: role-providers.test.ts additions (isToolRole true/false set, and that it equals TOOL_ROLES membership); tool-role-guard.test.ts (check returns violation for a child.config.generator.provider='claude-code'; check returns null for a clean/tiered child; assertManifest throws naming folder+role; assertManifest no-throw for a clean manifest); index.test.ts addition (runFleet with injected fake coordinator + a claude-code-on-generator manifest asserts throw AND fake coordinator.execute NOT called). Reuse the existing runFleet DI test pattern. Follow ESM .js imports, import type, unicode section headers.
evaluatorNotes: sc-3-3: assert isToolRole for all 7 RoleName values and that the true-set equals TOOL_ROLES; grep tool-role-guard.ts/role-providers.ts to confirm no second hard-coded tool-role list. sc-3-4: check() with a resolved config whose generator.provider resolves to claude-code -> ToolRoleViolation; clean -> null; wrap in expect(()=>check()).not.toThrow(). sc-3-5: assertManifest on a manifest with a claude-code-on-generator child -> throws, message includes folder + 'generator'; on a clean manifest (incl. tiered children) -> no throw. sc-3-6: drive runFleet with an injected fake coordinator (or the existing DI seam) + the bad manifest -> expect throw and assert the fake coordinator.execute was never called (no spawn). sc-3-7: a clean tier-less manifest passes; confirm validateManifest source is unchanged (git diff) and the fleet suite is unaffected. sc-3-2: FULL suite, only 6 known cockpit failures allowed. Build/typecheck/lint clean.
